zh.lifeSummary: 當Mabel FitzWilliam於1150年出生在英國英格蘭格盧斯特斯爾福可斯波利時，她的父親William FitzRobert 2nd Earl of Gloucester34歲，母親Hawise de Beaumont36歲。她於1158年與Gruffudd ap Ifor Bach結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1183年11月23日在英國英格蘭格盧斯特斯爾享年33歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Mabel FitzWilliam于1150年出生在英国英格兰格盧斯特斯爾福可斯波利时，她的父亲William FitzRobert 2nd Earl of Gloucester34岁，母亲Hawise de Beaumont36岁。她于1158年与Gruffudd ap Ifor Bach结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1183年11月23日在英国英格兰格盧斯特斯爾享年33岁。

nameMeanings.name: FitzWilliam
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English, Scottish, and Irish (of Norman origin): from Anglo-Norman French fiz ‘son’ (see Fitz ) + the personal name William .

variants.name: Fitz
meanings: English: from Anglo-Norman French fi(t)z ‘son’ (from Latin filius), used originally to distinguish a son from a father bearing the same personal name and then conventionalized as a hereditary surname, or short for a surname of which fiz ‘son’ was the first element, for example Fitzhenry and Fitzroy .
German: from a vernacular pet form of the personal name Vinzenz (see Vincent ) or Vitus (see Vito , compare Veit ). Compare also Fietz .

nameMeanings.name: Mabel
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a nickname from the Old French vocabulary word amabel, amable ‘lovely’ (akin to modern English amiable ‘friendly, good-humoured’). The initial vowel began to be lost as early as the 12th century (the same woman is referred to as both Mabilia and Amabilia in a document of 1185 ), but a short vowel in the resulting first syllable was standard, giving a rhyme with babble, until the 19th century, when people began to pronounce the name to rhyme with table.

en.lifeSummary: When Mabel FitzWilliam was born in 1150, in Tewkesbury, Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom, her father, William FitzRobert 2nd Earl of Gloucester, was 34 and her mother, Hawise de Beaumont, was 36. She married Gruffudd ap Ifor Bach in 1158. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 3 daughters. She died on 23 November 1183, in Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 33.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Mabel FitzWilliam est née en 1150, à Tewkesbury, Gloucestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, William FitzRobert 2nd Earl of Gloucester, avait 34 ans et sa mère, Hawise de Beaumont, avait 36 ans. Elle a épousé Gruffudd ap Ifor Bach en 1158. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée le 23 novembre 1183, à Gloucestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 33 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Mabel FitzWilliam 1150 in Tewkesbury, Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater William FitzRobert 2nd Earl of Gloucester 34 und ihre Mutter Hawise de Beaumont 36. Sie hat 1158 Gruffudd ap Ifor Bach geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb am 23. November 1183 im Alter von 33 Jahren in Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Mabel FitzWilliam è nata il nel 1150 nel Tewkesbury, Gloucestershire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, William FitzRobert 2nd Earl of Gloucester, aveva 34 anni e sua madre, Hawise de Beaumont, aveva 36 anni. Lei sposato Gruffudd ap Ifor Bach nel 1158. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 3 figlie. Morì il 23 novembre 1183, nel Gloucestershire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 33 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Mabel FitzWilliamが1150年にイギリスイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアテウケスブリーで生まれた時，父William FitzRobert 2nd Earl of Gloucesterは34歳，母Hawise de Beaumontは36歳であった。1158年にGruffudd ap Ifor Bachと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1183年11月23日にイギリスイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアで33歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Mabel FitzWilliam(이)가 1150년 영국 잉글랜드 그루스스터실르 튜케스버이에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 William FitzRobert 2nd Earl of Gloucester(은)는 34세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Hawise de Beaumont(은)는 36세였다. 그녀는 1158년 Gruffudd ap Ifor Bach(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1183년 11월 23일 영국 잉글랜드 그루스스터실르에서 33세의 나이로 사망했다.

Ela casou-se com Gruffudd ap Ifor Bach em 1158. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu em 23 de novembro de 1183, em Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 33 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Mabel FitzWilliam родилась в 1150 г. в местности тюкесбури, глоусестиршир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени William FitzRobert 2nd Earl of Gloucester было 34 года, а матери, которую звали Hawise de Beaumont, 36. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Gruffudd ap Ifor Bach в 1158 г. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 3 дочери. Она умерла 23 ноября 1183 г. в местности глоусестиршир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 33 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Mabel FitzWilliam nació en 1150, en Tewkesbury, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, William FitzRobert 2nd Earl of Gloucester, tenía 34 años y su mamá, Hawise de Beaumont, tenía 36 años. Se casó con Gruffudd ap Ifor Bach en 1158. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió el 23 de noviembre de 1183, en Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 33 años.
